PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-19-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Shaun Carberry for Maryanne Silber (Proposed Executor).

Mr. Carberry stated that he represented the Decedent for 6 years prior to her death, that the last codicil was written and drafted by him, that he made copies of the will and three codicils, that the Decedent was very thorough and that he believed she did not have any change in her testamentary capacity. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Guitron.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-29-2008 Continued To Nov-19-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
